title: Concern for jailed Iranian Nobel laureate as family say health deteriorating
summary_full: On Friday her family said the 54-year-old had been taken from prison to a local hospital after a sharp deterioration in her health.
summary_public: On Friday her family said the 54-year-old had been taken from prison to a local hospital after a sharp deterioration in her health.
